definition_ko: 지휘관이 예하 부대에 내리는 작전 수행 명령
definition_en: A directive issued by a commander to subordinate commanders
A preliminary notice of an order or action which is to follow
An abbreviated form of an operation order

definition_ko: 직사화기 간접화기 항공화력 등을 통한 전투지원
definition_en: Collective and coordinated use of target acquisition data and fire weapons
Fire support provided by artillery units
The activity of providing goods and materials needed by a unit

definition_ko: 적 및 환경에 관한 정보의 수집 처리 분석
definition_en: The product resulting from the collection and analysis of information

definition_ko: 작전 수행을 위한 지휘관의 권한 행사 및 지휘 절차
definition_en: The exercise of authority and direction by a designated commander
A physical facility at which the primary functions of the command post are performed
